paper_claim: The proposed target-gated residual TCN improves short-to-medium horizon controlled forecasting on normal and fault batches.
recommended_wording: Use for h=1/5/20 only; say short-to-medium horizon, not all horizons.
key_numbers: Against XGBoost, nRMSE reduction is 32.37/14.64/20.02% on normal h=1/5/20 and 70.13/50.81/28.34% on fault h=1/5/20.
do_not_overclaim: Do not claim full-horizon dominance; h=40/60 context is in supplement.

paper_claim: Raman spectra carry transferable biochemical information for soft sensing.
recommended_wording: Use as external Raman soft-sensing validation, not as full FermNFTP external validation.
key_numbers: External RWTH F4+F5 R2: Glucose 0.9956, Malic acid 0.9890, Succinic acid 0.9607.
do_not_overclaim: Do not use BTM as positive main-text evidence; do not claim validation of future-control forecasting on RWTH.

paper_claim: Residual scores provide reliable fault generalization and early warning signals.
recommended_wording: Emphasize ranking metrics and zero false alarms under train-normal thresholding.
key_numbers: Target-gated residual score AUROC/AUPRC at h=1/5/20 are 0.994/0.995, 0.996/0.996, and 1.000/1.000; false alarm rate is 0.
do_not_overclaim: Do not claim fault-type classification; available labels support detection/generalization only.

paper_claim: Split conformal intervals are calibrated for normal operating batches.
recommended_wording: Use normal-batch calibration as the primary uncertainty claim.
do_not_overclaim: Do not say fault-batch coverage remains nominal; fault-batch coverage is lower and should be discussed as domain shift.

paper_claim: Internal paired bootstrap supports residual learning and attention fusion effects.
recommended_wording: Use p-values and CIs for selected supported comparisons only.
key_numbers: Residual learning vs ridge and attention vs global gate have positive bootstrap nRMSE reductions with p<0.05 across selected horizons.
do_not_overclaim: Do not claim every fusion component is significant at every horizon.

paper_claim: The proposed model is deployable for soft-sensing latency constraints.
recommended_wording: Report parameter count, training time, latency, and throughput as engineering evidence.
key_numbers: Target-gated airPLS model has about 818k parameters and test-normal latency about 0.18-0.21 ms/sample.
do_not_overclaim: Do not claim industrial deployment was physically tested in a live plant.
